## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what changed and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] New model entry
- [ ] Metadata correction
- [ ] UI change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run check:landscape` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

## For new model entries

- [ ] Public code repository (`githubUrl`) included
- [ ] Paper / preprint link (`paperUrl`) included
- [ ] Lineage edge rationale explained in the PR description
- [ ] `supportsCharges` filled (`true` / `false` / `null` if unknown)
- [ ] `supportsSpins` filled (`true` / `false` / `null` if unknown)
- [ ] `elementsCovered` filled (explicit list, shorthand, or `"—"` if unknown)
- [ ] `license` / `maintenance` / `lastReviewed` filled when available

## Screenshots / videos

<!--
For UI changes, include desktop and mobile screenshots where relevant.
For data-only changes, this section can be left blank.
-->
